description_long: This object is a modern surveillance camera with a sleek, spherical housing finished in matte black. The front features a prominent, circular lens with a striking purple tint, surrounded by a recessed black bezel. The camera sits atop a rounded base that appears designed for mounting, with a subtle seam separating the main body from the base. The rear and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist, high-tech aesthetic. The overall design suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor or indoor urban environments. The lens area is the only visible functional component, with no visible buttons or external wiring.
description: A sleek, spherical black surveillance camera with a prominent purple-tinted lens and a rounded mounting base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, purple-tinted lens and the recessed bezel, highlighting the camera's primary functional area.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth, unbroken curvature of the housing and the seam between the body and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the seamless, featureless back of the camera, emphasizing its minimalist design.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the continuous spherical shape and the mounting base connection.
